failedToLoad: Failed to load content. Please try again.
digitalBrainHubSubtitle: Capture in the inbox, review with AI, and grow structured knowledge — AI suggests, you validate.
hubInboxDesc: Pending captures waiting for your review.
hubKnowledgeDesc: Structured notes derived from confirmed captures.
hubCaptureDesc: Fast capture: text, links, or documents — no decisions required.
captureHint: Save to your inbox first. You can review AI suggestions and confirm later.
rawContentPlaceholder: Notes, transcript snippet, or anything you want to remember…
inboxSubtitle: Items here are captured but not yet turned into knowledge. Select and review with AI when you are ready.
inboxManualModeHint: Processing is set to manual: run AI on each item before review, or open details.
inboxEmpty: Your inbox is empty. Capture something without friction.
processingSubtitle: Jobs created when you capture (queued) and when the legacy pipeline runs.
knowledgeSubtitle: Structured knowledge after you confirm AI suggestions (Second Brain / Zettelkasten style).
knowledgeEmpty: No knowledge items yet. Confirm items from your inbox to create notes here.

knowledge.facetsLoadError: Could not load tag/type options. Check your connection and try again.
knowledge.layoutFromSettings: Layout follows your knowledge organization style in settings.
knowledge.downloadThisRunHint: Only this download uses the format you pick here. Your saved default does not change.

noSummaryYet: No summary available yet. Processing may still be in progress.
aiPreviewFailedGeneric: Failed to generate AI suggestions. Please try again.
notificationsEnabled: Enable notifications to remind me to review this content
notificationsReminderRequired: Please select reminder date and time.
notificationsReminderFuture: Reminder must be set to a future date and time.
title: Title
contentNotFoundOrFailed: Content not found or failed to load.
profileLoadError: Could not load your profile. Please try again.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account, photo, and display name. Language and display preferences live under Preferences in the account menu.
profile.photoHint: JPEG, PNG, WebP or GIF. Maximum 2 MB.
profile.photoTooLarge: Image must be at most 2 MB.
profile.emailHint: Email cannot be changed from here.
profile.displayNamePlaceholder: How you want to be addressed (optional)

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.subtitle: Language, appearance, time zone, and how dates and times are shown. These settings apply across the app.
preferences.languageHint: Used for the whole interface. When supported, it can also influence AI responses.
preferences.themeHint: Dark and light use fixed palettes. System follows your device setting.
preferences.timezoneHint: Used when formatting dates and times. Does not change stored data.
preferences.dateFormatHint: How calendar dates are displayed (sample below).
preferences.previewNote: Example using 15 June 2024, 14:30 UTC — shown in your time zone and formats.

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.intro: Configure the AI model, how captures are processed, and how your knowledge layer is organized. All changes apply after you save.

settingsAi.title: AI & processing
settingsAi.intro: Adjust model output, automatic capture handling, and the processing pipeline.
settingsAi.blockAiIntro: Options related to the AI model’s behavior when generating content.
settingsAi.blockFlowIntro: Controls how captured information is processed.
settingsAi.pipelineStepsHint: Disable any step you do not want the backend to run automatically. “Suggest connections” is reserved for future linking between knowledge items (logged only for now).
settingsAi.stepDuplicates: Detect duplicates (same URL for your account)
settingsAi.processingModeHint: When the full pipeline should start after you capture something.
settingsAi.modeBackground: Background — queued and processed within a few seconds
settingsAi.modeManual: Manual — only when you start processing from the inbox
settingsAi.modeManualHint: In manual mode, use “Run AI processing” on an inbox item or open AI review as usual.
settingsAi.chunkHint: Approximate token window used when splitting long text before the model (maps to ~4 characters per token).
settingsAi.summaryLevelHint: Controls the length and depth of generated summaries and previews.
settingsAi.summaryLevelMeta: Affects token budget, sampling temperature, and prompt instructions sent to the model.
settingsAi.responseLangHint: Sets the language the model should use for titles, summaries, and tags (where supported).
settingsAi.autoProcessTooltip: When this is enabled, new captures are processed right away without your review. The app saves the results as suggested by the AI (title, summary, tags, etc.) and you are not asked to confirm. Use it only if you accept unsupervised AI output.
settingsAi.autoProcessHint: When enabled, the full analysis pipeline runs right after you capture content. When disabled, items stay in the inbox until you review them — capture now, process later.

settingsKnowledge.title: Knowledge configuration (Digital Brain)
settingsKnowledge.intro: Control how knowledge is organized in the UI and which automations run after you confirm a note. Tags, folders, and relations are always stored — only navigation defaults change here.
settingsKnowledge.organizationHint: Choose how the Knowledge screen is laid out by default.
settingsKnowledge.organizationUiOnly: This does not change stored data. You can switch styles anytime without migration.
settingsKnowledge.styleTags: Tags — group and filter by tag
settingsKnowledge.styleFolders: Folders — hierarchical tree and folder assignment
settingsKnowledge.styleGraph: Graph (Zettelkasten) — notes and links between them
settingsKnowledge.foldersDataHint: Create folders here, then assign notes to them from each knowledge detail page. Nested folders can be added later via API (parentId).
settingsKnowledge.autoTaggingHint: When enabled, the AI suggests tags during processing if “Generate tags” is on in the processing pipeline. Tags remain editable after capture.
settingsKnowledge.autoTaggingEnabled: Enable automatic tagging from the AI
settingsKnowledge.autoLinkHint: After you save a note to knowledge, the system can link it to similar existing notes (related content). Enables backlinks and graph edges.

settingsNotifications.title: Notifications
settingsNotifications.intro: Choose which in-app alerts appear in the bell next to your profile. Email is not used here.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.typeProcessingFinished: Processing finished — your capture is ready
notifications.typeDuplicate: Possible duplicate — same URL as an earlier capture

settingsPrivacy.blockIntro: Control how long inbox captures are kept and your default file format for downloading knowledge from the Knowledge screen.
settingsPrivacy.retentionHint: Applies to inbox captures by upload date. Confirmed knowledge tied to a deleted capture is removed with it. A daily job also enforces this policy.
settingsPrivacy.defaultExportHint: Used when you download notes from Knowledge. Each download dialog can override this for that file only.
